message:
feat(tree): add RichText colorization to tree view (#7)

Tree view now renders with the same color conventions as Main List and
Graph views: priority badges (P0 red through P4 gray), status-colored
icons, dim tree-prefix lines, styled collapse indicators, and blocker/
cycle indicators using the existing token system.

Implementation adds tree_list_render_text() which builds RichLine objects
with individually styled RichSpan segments, wired into the list panel
dispatch. The old tree_list_text() now delegates to the render method.

Closes #7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
